meaning: n.<印> 相当于Mr或Sir的称谓
examples: From now I began constantly to meet Bankim Babu.
In the evening Aghore Babu came for our English lessons.
Gyan Babu, son of Pandit Vedantavagish, was now our tutor at home.
Babu Lal Marotia held out the tiny portrait for the Prince, who showed his surprise at the creation.
Ch Supt Babu agreed that a fresh approach was needed but said it could be done without new legislation.
